name: What if no witnesses to the AI referral discussion in Phoenix?
description: Emails/logs prove it; witnesses not required in AZ.

mainEntity.name: What if no witnesses to the AI referral discussion in Phoenix?

acceptedAnswer.text: Emails/logs prove it; witnesses not required in AZ.
acceptedAnswer.description: Circumstantial evidence like emails, logs suffices. Arizona allows digital proof. Key factors: (1) Metadata trails; (2) Firm admissions; (3) Expert reconstruction. Subpoena AI usage data. Your testimony counts.
